content.full_text:
Fern Polrrrcnl PnecrtcEs C oMMISSToN
428 J Street o Suite 620 o Sacramento. CA 95811-2329
(916) 322-5660 o Fax (916) 322-0886
June 5, 2008
Marcy DeMartile
Plumas County Elections
520 Main Street, Room 102
Qtrincy, CA 95971
Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. A-08-090
Dear Ms. DeMartile:
This letter is in response to your request on behalf of the Plumas County Hospital
District for advice regarding campaign provisions of the Political Reform Act (the
"Act").1
QUESTION
May committees involved in the Plumas County Hospital District bond measure
election to be held on July 22,2008, combine the semi-annual statement with the second
pre-election statement due on July 10, 2008?
CONCLUSION
In connection with a July 22,2008 election, committees may use a filing schedule
that combines the semi-annual campaign statement with the second pre-election
statement due on July 10, 2008.
I The Political Refurm Act is contained in Government Code Sections 8l(XX) through 91014. All
statutory references are to the Government Code, unless otherwise indicated. The regulations of the Fair
Rrlitical Practices Commission are contained in Sections l 8 l l0 through l ti997 of Title 2 of the Caliturnia
Code of Regulations. All regulakrry ret'erences are to Title 2. Division 6 of the California Code of
Regulations, unless otherwise indicated.


File No. A-08-090
Page No. 2
ANALYSIS
During an election, candidates and committees involved in the election are
required to file two campaign statements disclosing contributions received and
expenditures made in connection with that election. These pre-election campaign
statements are generally filed 40 days before the election and again l2 days before the
election. (Section 84200.8.) Semi-annual statements are filed January 31 and July 31,
respectively. (Section 84200.)
There is a mechanism in the Act that permits the combining of statements when
an overlapping reporting period occurs, or the filing of the semi-annual statement would
be an additional, Llnnecessary filing to the two pre-election statements. (Section 84205.)
In this case, filing the two pre-election statements in connection with a July 22,2008,
election will satisfy the semi-annual filing requirement.
A campaign statement filing schedule which outlines the due dates for filing
statements in connection with the election is enclosed for your convenience.
If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me
at (916) 322-5660.
Sincerely,
Scott Hallabrin
General
By: Kevin S
?^
'Mo", PhD
Political Reform Consultant
Technical Assistance Division
KSM:jgl
Enclosure
